ai_technologies.name: Autodesk Assistant
ai_technologies.context: Integrated to help developers with API usage and cost estimation

ai_technologies.name: AI
ai_technologies.context: Discussing how AI is changing software development and workflow creation.

summary: The video outlines the roadmap for Autodesk Platform Services (APS), highlighting the shift towards continuous automation, autonomous workflows, and simplification of user experiences. It discusses the evolution of the APS business model with new features to enhance developer experience, integration of AI capabilities, and support for element reuse across workflows. The video also promotes collaboration through initiatives like the Developer Vanguard program.
